situational_context: Running comeback deep into consolidation: 15 running activities since May 3, 2026 (73 days in) — 14 numbered comeback runs plus one unnumbered opportunistic short run (June 2). Distances now range 3.5–7.5 km; longest well-tolerated run to date is 7.5 km (Run #12, June 21, avg HR 140, no issues) with a 6.0 km 'dépassement' on July 5 also absorbed cleanly. Most recent run (July 13, Saint-Malo) was a shorter 4.5 km at higher avg HR (142) — travel context, not a red flag. VO2max running continues climbing: 41.6 (up from 40.6 mid-June, 38.3 at comeback start). ACWR has normalized to ~1.04 (down from 1.35 in mid-June), now solidly mid-band even without the comeback override. HRV 7d avg has stabilized around 34–35 ms for the past month (down from 39–40 pre-comeback, but no further decline since mid-June) with status flipping BALANCED/UNBALANCED — not worsening, just a new lower plateau. RHR stable at ~50 bpm (30d avg 49.6). Sleep improved to 7.5h 30d avg (up from 7.26h at last refresh). Weight tracking has lapsed: last Withings reading is 103.67 kg on June 20 (25 days stale, up ~1 kg from 102.6 kg on June 6) — no new weigh-ins logged since. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest was due ~July 2026 and has not yet been logged.

recommendations.text: Weight tracking has lapsed — no Withings reading in 25 days (last: 103.67 kg, June 20). Body-mass drives the ground-reaction-force risk model underpinning the whole comeback protocol (return-to-running.md §2, §4D); resume regular weigh-ins so that estimate stays current.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 weigh-ins logged in the next 7 days

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest was due ~July 2026 (8 weeks post-comeback start, May 3) and has not yet been logged — no new labs since Dec 2025 (27 ng/mL, insufficient). Schedule the blood panel now.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed before end of July 2026

recommendations.text: Demonstrated tolerance has risen: 7.5 km (June 21) and a 6.0 km 'dépassement' (July 5) both absorbed with clean recovery. Anchor the easy-run floor at ~6-7 km and keep progressing the long run toward 8-10 km per return-to-running.md §4F rather than clamping to the July 13 shorter run, which was a travel-context outlier.
recommendations.measurable: Next long run ≥7 km with no pain lasting >24h

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if no new Withings reading lands within the next 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: 25-day gap already exists; the comeback's injury-risk model depends on current body mass

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 30 ms, or fails to trend back toward 37-39 ms over the next 2-3 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Has plateaued at 34-35 ms for a month (down from 39-40 pre-comeback) — stable for now, but a further drop would signal accumulating fatigue

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at ~104 kg body weight; pain signals early overload
